creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
On wed 17 nov 10 at 21:11:17 +0100, Henrik Brix Andersen <brix@FreeBSD.org>
 wrote:
> Hi,

Hello,

> On Nov 16, 2010, at 21:15, Thierry Thomas wrote:
> > Please let me know when you'll consider this PR as OK, in order to
> > synchronize it with PR ports/152191.
> 
> Actually, we are in the middle of a repocopy (which went terribly
> wrong in the first coordination attempt), see ports/151093.

Yes, I know: marcus did the repocopy, and pgollucci assigned PR
ports/151093 to me.

> The plan is to keep both the 1.0.x and the 1.2.x series in FreeBSD Ports.

I'm not sure that many people will want to keep the old API, but if
there are, we know that www/xapian-omega10 run with
databases/xapian-core10, no problem.

The aim of this PR ports/152194 is to upgrade xapian-omega to the new
version, and test it against the new xapian-core.

Best regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
